source: CT6-6 §1 (Librarian, LIB-1…13) — the first concrete service on the v3.23.0 substrate; background topic-research curation + a searchable concept index, on the shared BG runtime + Anthropic key

scenarios: a conceptual query ranks a concept hit above a mere text mention
acceptance_criteria: stdlib sqlite3 reference index: title/summary/keywords/concept-cloud per doc
lookup by keyword + by concept; idempotent re-index by doc_id
conceptual_search weighted overlap concept x3 / keyword x2 / text x1
unicode-folded tokens (NFKD + casefold) so cafe ~ cafe

scenarios: a brace inside a string value does not truncate the parse
acceptance_criteria: extraction prompt asks confirm-relevance + title/summary/keywords/concept-cloud as one JSON object
string-aware parse via JSONDecoder.raw_decode (brace-in-string safe)
unparseable reply -> not-relevant record, never raises
stable sha256 doc id (idempotent re-ingest)

scenarios: fetch -> extract -> index -> metadata, with a safe body store
acceptance_criteria: research_topic: fetch->extract->index relevant keepers (relevant AND (title OR summary) gate)->write per-topic metadata
per-topic scheduler task on shared bg_runtime + per-OS install descriptor
LIB-8 file-folder body store with path-safe filename (no traversal escape)
Source/StaticSource + LLMClient/FakeLLMClient adapters

scenarios: the adapter boundary + honest scope are documented
acceptance_criteria: services/librarian stdlib-only core, design-not-deployed
source / vector-store (LIB-9) / LLM are adapters with stdlib fallbacks
LIB-4 centralized curation endpoint + LIB-7 global-MemPalace-install disclosed as not built
services/README Layout documents the landed Librarian
tests/test_services_librarian.py present + passing (14 cases)
index round-trip/idempotent/keyword+concept/conceptual ranking/concept-cloud
extract prompt + string-aware parse + stable id
orchestration keep-vs-skip + metadata + scheduler + descriptor + body-store path safety + per-topic closure
full suite green cp1252 AND PYTHONUTF8=1
independent adversarial review FIX-FIRST -> remediated

testing_authorizations.playwright: N/A — no UI/frontend surface (a stdlib-only background service + tests).
testing_authorizations.dev_api_integration: N/A — the data source / vector store / Anthropic LLM are external infra behind adapter boundaries (not in-repo); the deterministic core (index + extract parse + orchestration) is exercised by the pytest suite with StaticSource + FakeLLMClient.

confirmed_stubs.why: the web-scrape / attached-API content source is the operator's to provide (the separated service tier's own dep, REPO-4); the core ships the Source interface + StaticSource for tests — an honest adapter boundary, not a gap

the preferred vector store needs ChromaDB/MemPalace (external infra); the stdlib sqlite concept index is the documented deterministic stand-in, with conceptual_search hedged as overlap-not-semantic — by design, not a gap

confirmed_stubs.stub: LIB-4 centralized curation endpoint + LIB-7 global-MemPalace-install research
confirmed_stubs.why: explicitly design-stage per the honesty ledger — topics are a local registry here, not a server-side curation point; documented as not built, not a silent omission
